# SCStreamOutputType.audio

**Case**

An output type that represents an audio capture sample buffer.

## Declaration

```swift
case audio
```

## Discussion

A captured sample buffer wraps an [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreAudioTypes/AudioBufferList] structure that contains the audio samples. The stream configuration’s [doc://com.apple.screencapturekit/documentation/ScreenCaptureKit/SCStreamConfiguration/sampleRate] and [doc://com.apple.screencapturekit/documentation/ScreenCaptureKit/SCStreamConfiguration/channelCount] property values determine of the format of the audio.

## Output types

- **SCStreamOutputType.screen**: An output type that represents a screen capture sample buffer.
